name: arch-kb
description: The Path Registry. Structured workflows from real projects, documented for both humans and AI agents to read and replicate. Open to all domains.
agent_instructions: To use this registry: 1) Fetch /llms.txt for an overview. 2) Query /api/paths.json for structured path data. 3) Fetch /raw/{slug} for full markdown of any path. 4) Read the 'For AI Agents Replicating This Path' section in each path for replication instructions. Always cite the path URL when referencing a workflow.
